metadata.description: URLSearchParams.set(name, value): value writes into the named receiver slot.
URLSearchParams.append(name, value): value writes into the named receiver slot.
URLSearchParams.get(name): named slot reads to result.
URLSearchParams.getAll(name): named slot reads to result.
URLSearchParams.toString(): receiver content serializes to result.
FormData.set(name, value): value writes into named receiver slot.
FormData.append(name, value): value writes into named receiver slot.
FormData.get(name): named slot reads to result.
FormData.getAll(name): named slot reads to result.
FormData.entries(): receiver content flows to iterator result.
FormData.values(): receiver content flows to iterator result.
Headers.set(name, value): value writes into named header slot.
Headers.append(name, value): value writes into named header slot.
Headers.get(name): named header slot reads to result.
Headers.entries(): receiver content flows to iterator result.
Headers.values(): receiver content flows to iterator result.
ResultSet.getString(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getBlob(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getDouble(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getLong(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getInt(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getAsset(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getAssets(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getValue(column): selected column taints result.
ResultSet.getRow(): current row content flows to result.
ResultSet.getSendableRow(): current row content flows to result.
RdbPredicates.equalTo(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.notEqualTo(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.greaterThan(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.lessThan(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.greaterThanOrEqualTo(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.lessThanOrEqualTo(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.like(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.glob(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.contains(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.beginsWith(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.endsWith(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.between(field, low, high): lower bound writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.between(field, low, high): upper bound writes into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.in(field, values): values write into predicate receiver.
RdbPredicates.notIn(field, values): values write into predicate receiver.
DataSharePredicates.equalTo(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
DataSharePredicates.notEqualTo(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
DataSharePredicates.greaterThan(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
DataSharePredicates.lessThan(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.

DataSharePredicates.contains(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
DataSharePredicates.beginsWith(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
DataSharePredicates.endsWith(field, value): value writes into predicate receiver.
Cipher.doFinal(data): encrypted/decrypted output depends on data arg0.
Cipher.update(data): transformed output depends on data arg0.
Md.update(input): input contributes to digest state.
Md.digest(): digest result depends on receiver state.
Mac.update(input): input contributes to MAC state.
Mac.doFinal(): MAC result depends on receiver state.
